## Summary

- 

## Scope

- [ ] Code behavior changed
- [ ] Docs changed
- [ ] Examples changed
- [ ] GitHub Action or CI changed
- [ ] No behavior change

## Local Checks

- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] CLI smoke command, if relevant

## Safety And Boundaries

- [ ] No MCP servers are executed by this change.
- [ ] No live `tools/list` requests are added.
- [ ] No external AI API calls are added.
- [ ] No telemetry, cloud sync, login, database, billing, or SaaS behavior is added.
- [ ] Findings are described as static signals, warnings, or transparency notes.
- [ ] Examples and test fixtures contain no real secrets or private configs.

## Notes For Reviewers

Please redact any private configs, internal paths, or secret values before adding screenshots, logs, or report excerpts.
